questions.original_question: 路特斯科技有哪些ESG成就？
questions.answer: Lotus Technology 在环境、社会和治理（ESG）方面取得了显著成就。首先，所有未来的主流车型都将完全电动化，标志着公司向全电动车阵容的转型。其次，公司在实现碳中和目标上做出了重大努力，包括在制造工厂采用光伏发电系统，2023年该系统已生成超过9,800兆瓦时的电力。此外，Lotus Technology 还实施了多种节能减排措施，如干式喷漆室设计、废气焚烧、雨水收集与再利用、废水处理等，以减少环境影响。公司还计划在2038年前实现整个价值链的碳中和。另外，Lotus Technology 通过教育推广项目和社会支持活动，积极激励下一代参与科学、技术、工程、艺术和数学领域的发展。公司在2023年10月25日发布了首份年度ESG报告，详细记录了其ESG战略和2022年的成就，并将这些目标与联合国可持续发展目标（SDGs）对齐。此信息基于2025年4月30日前的知识。
rewritten_question: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

rag_info.chunk_content: The driving change commitment includes significant reduction in carbon emissions throughout the business, substantial elimination of waste, driving efficient and sustainable use of resources in both operations and supply chains, and protecting and preserving natural environments. Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant adopted a water reuse system that replenishes the water volume of Lotus Lake by recycling roof rainwater. The lake water will be treated and used for greening, flushing, and landscaping. ● Inspiring the next generation. To help engage the next generation of Lotus colleagues, Lotus Technology leverages its unique global appeal and stimulates the ambitions of the next generation, especially in the creative science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics subjects. Lotus Technology helps carry out educational outreach programs and works with communities outside the core business to provide support and stability within those environments. Lotus Technology also adopts and aligns its strategy to external frameworks including the UN Global Compact, including commitments to transparent, responsible, and ethical business management. Lotus Technology released its first annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, which documented its ESG strategy and highlighted its 2022 ESG achievements as part of Lotus’s advancement into an intelligent and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy.
rag_info.sub_query: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus achieved significant operational efficiency in 2024 by reducing operating expenses for four consecutive quarters. This focus on streamlining operations contributed to their robust performance throughout the year. The company also made notable progress in ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) achievements. Lotus was highly commended at the Reuters Sustainability Awards 2024, leading the electric vehicle industry within the Reuters Vision 2045 Campaign. Additionally, Lotus won the 2024 EUCCC Sustainable Business Award and the Green Apple Award for its excellent environmental practices. Further underscoring its commitment to sustainability, Lotus presented a sustainable supplier management case during the Shanghai Climate Week 2024. This was part of the Climate Tech in Focus Report, slated for release at COP29.
rag_info.sub_query: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus Technology released its first annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, which documented Lotus Technology's ESG strategy and highlighted Lotus Technology's 2022 ESG achievements as part of Lotus's advancement into a fully electric, intelligent, and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy. Lotus Technology's strategy focuses on six key fields: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. Lotus Technology joined the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) in May 2023 and has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) for each field, embedding actionable frameworks into its operations to achieve the global goals.
rag_info.sub_query: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

rag_info.chunk_content: Manufacturing sustainability is of high importance to Lotus Technology, and minimizing environmental impacts is one of the most important targets of the manufacturing plant from the very beginning. Lotus Technology has worked with Geely Holding to carry out a series of energy-saving and emission reduction measures at Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant. The photovoltaic power generation system at Lotus Global Smart Factory generated more than 23,000 MWh in 2024. Lotus Global Smart Factory was honored as the “Leading Zero-Carbon Factory.” Moreover, Lotus Technology's Raw Material Natural Capital Assessment Project was recognized as a leading industry practice in the World Economic Forum's Nature Positive Transition Report series. Inspiring the next generation. To help engage the next generation of Lotus colleagues, Lotus Technology leverages the brand’s unique global appeal and stimulates the ambitions of the next generation, especially in the creative science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics subjects. The company helps carry out educational outreach programs and works with communities outside the core business to provide support and stability within those environments. Lotus Technology also adopts and aligns its strategy to external frameworks including the UN Global Compact, including commitments to transparent, responsible, and ethical business management. Lotus Technology releases an ESG Report annually to document its ESG strategy and highlight its ESG achievements as part of Lotus's advancement into an intelligent and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy. Lotus Technology's strategy focuses on six key fields: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance.
rag_info.sub_query: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus Technology joined the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) and became a supporter of the ISSB in 2023. Lotus Technology has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) for each field, embedding actionable frameworks into its operations to achieve the global goals. In 2024, Lotus Technology was granted the Highly Commended honor at the Reuters Sustainability Awards 2024 and was awarded the Green Apple Environment Award by the Green Organization for its innovation and exceptional commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices. Additionally, Lotus Technology was honored as the Decarbonization Leader by the European Union Chamber of Commerce in China, demonstrating global recognition of its holistic approach to sustainability.
rag_info.sub_query: What are the ESG achievements of Lotus Technology?

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Guided by the same principle of the Lotus brand and in collaboration with Lotus UK, the new Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter formalizes the activities that Lotus Technology has been carrying out. As Lotus Technology transforms rapidly to become a global pioneer of electric performance vehicles, the company recognizes its responsibility to do so in ways that lead the industry in minimizing its impact on the environment, benefiting society and the planet as a whole. ● All electric. The first of Lotus Technology's core Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) commitments is that, throughout the Lotus product line, all future new mainstream vehicles from Lotus Technology and from Lotus UK will be fully electric. The Eletre, the latest of Lotus Technology's new generation of vehicles, marks the company's transition to a full line-up of electric vehicles. ● Carbon-neutral sustainable development. Lotus Technology plans to achieve its goal of becoming a carbon-neutral company through sustainability in the design of products. Manufacturing sustainability is of high importance to Lotus Technology. Minimizing environmental impacts is one of the most important targets of the manufacturing plant from the very beginning.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: The Lotus Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in collaboration with Lotus UK, underscores the company's commitment to reducing its environmental impact while striving to become a global leader in electric performance vehicles. Key elements of the Charter include:

1. **Transition to All Electric Vehicles**: Lotus has committed to producing fully electric vehicles for its future mainstream lineup, with the Eletre serving as the inaugural model in this transition.

2. **Carbon-Neutral Sustainable Development Goals**: The company aims to achieve carbon neutrality across all scopes (Scope 1, 2, and 3) by 2038. This objective is supported by sustainable product design and manufacturing practices. Notably, partnerships with Geely Holding have facilitated the implementation of energy-saving initiatives at their manufacturing plant, including a photovoltaic power generation system with a capacity exceeding 16 million kWh, waste gas incineration, and advanced water reuse systems that help replenish Lotus Lake.

3. **Educational Outreach and Community Engagement**: Lotus is dedicated to inspiring the next generation through educational initiatives in science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics (STEAM). The company aligns its strategies with ethical business management frameworks, such as the UN Global Compact.

4. **Annual ESG Reporting**: The inaugural annual ESG Report was published on October 25, 2023, which outlines the company's ESG strategy and achievements for 2022. This report is part of the Vision80 strategy, focusing on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance.

5. **Commitment to Global Goals**: In May 2023, Lotus joined the United Nations Global Compact and established targets that align with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) across its focus areas. This integration of actionable frameworks into its operations demonstrates Lotus's commitment to meeting global sustainability objectives.

In summary, the Lotus ESG Charter reflects a comprehensive approach to sustainability, emphasizing electric vehicle production, carbon neutrality, community engagement, transparent reporting, and alignment with global sustainability goals.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology released its first annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, which documents Lotus Technology's ESG strategy and highlights Lotus Technology's 2022 ESG achievements as part of Lotus's advancement into a fully electric, intelligent, and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy. Lotus Technology's strategy focuses on six key fields: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. Lotus Technology joined the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) in May 2023 and has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) for each field, embedding actionable frameworks into its operations to achieve the global goals.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: The newly developed Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, created in partnership with Lotus UK, reflects the brand's commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. This initiative underscores Lotus's ambition to lead in the electric performance vehicle sector while actively minimizing its ecological footprint. The company has pledged to transition to an all-electric product lineup, with the Eletre marking a significant step in this direction. 

Lotus aims for carbon neutrality through sustainable design and manufacturing, implementing energy-saving measures and emission reduction initiatives in collaboration with Geely Holding. Key strategies include the installation of a dry box spray room, photovoltaic systems expected to generate over 16 million kWh by 2023, and a comprehensive water reuse system that recycles rainwater. The goal is to achieve 100% green power by 2025 and carbon neutrality by 2038 across all emissions scopes.

In addition to environmental efforts, Lotus is dedicated to community engagement, particularly in inspiring youth in STEAM fields through educational outreach. The company aligns its practices with the UN Global Compact, committing to ethical business conduct. The release of its inaugural annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, highlights its strategy and achievements in transitioning to a sustainable luxury mobility provider under the Vision80 framework, focusing on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance, while setting targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology released its first annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, which documented Lotus Technology's ESG strategy and highlighted Lotus Technology's 2022 ESG achievements as part of Lotus's advancement into a fully electric, intelligent, and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy. Lotus Technology's strategy focuses on six key fields: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. Lotus Technology joined the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC) in May 2023 and has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) for each field, embedding actionable frameworks into its operations to achieve the global goals.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus UK has introduced a new Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in collaboration with Lotus UK, to formalize its commitment to sustainability as it transitions into a global leader in electric performance vehicles. The company is dedicated to an all-electric future, with all new mainstream vehicles being fully electric, exemplified by the launch of the Eletre. Lotus aims for carbon neutrality by 2038 through sustainable design and manufacturing practices, including energy-saving measures implemented at its manufacturing plant in partnership with Geely Holding. These measures encompass a range of initiatives such as photovoltaic power generation, waste gas incineration, and a water reuse system that recycles rainwater for landscaping.

Lotus's ESG strategy addresses all scopes of carbon emissions and focuses on waste reduction, resource optimization, and environmental preservation. The company also seeks to inspire future generations by engaging communities in STEAM fields through educational outreach. Their efforts align with global frameworks like the UN Global Compact, emphasizing ethical business practices. On October 25, 2023, Lotus published its first annual ESG Report, detailing its strategy and achievements in 2022, and reinforcing its Vision80 commitment to becoming a sustainable luxury mobility provider. The ESG approach is structured around six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance, with specific targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus UK has introduced a new Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in partnership with Lotus UK, which formalizes its commitment to sustainability as it transitions into a global leader in electric performance vehicles. The company is dedicated to an all-electric future, with plans for all new mainstream vehicles to be fully electric, starting with the Eletre. Lotus aims for carbon neutrality by 2038, implementing sustainable design and manufacturing practices, including energy-saving measures at its manufacturing plant in collaboration with Geely Holding. These initiatives feature advanced technologies such as a dry box spray room, photovoltaic power generation, waste gas incineration, and a water reuse system to recycle rainwater.

Lotus's ESG strategy focuses on minimizing environmental impacts, significantly reducing carbon emissions, and promoting efficient resource use. Additionally, the company is committed to inspiring future generations through educational outreach in STEAM fields and engaging with communities beyond its core business. This strategy aligns with external frameworks like the UN Global Compact, emphasizing responsible and ethical practices. The inaugural annual ESG Report, published on October 25, 2023, highlights Lotus's achievements and aligns with its Vision80 strategy, which aims to establish the brand as a sustainable luxury mobility provider. The report outlines six key focus areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance, while also setting targets that align with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus UK has introduced a new Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in partnership with Lotus UK, which reflects the brand's commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. The organization aims to lead in the electric performance vehicle market while minimizing its ecological footprint and positively impacting society. All new mainstream vehicles from Lotus will be fully electric, with the Eletre marking a significant step in this transition.

To achieve carbon neutrality by 2038, Lotus is implementing sustainable design and manufacturing practices, including energy-saving initiatives at its manufacturing plant in collaboration with Geely Holding. These initiatives involve advanced technologies such as a dry box spray room, photovoltaic power generation, and a water reuse system that recycles rainwater for landscaping. The photovoltaic system is expected to generate over 16 million kWh in 2023, with a goal of achieving 100% green power by 2025.

Lotus is also dedicated to inspiring future generations through educational outreach in STEAM fields and aligning its strategies with external frameworks like the UN Global Compact. The company's inaugural annual ESG Report, published on October 25, 2023, details its ESG strategy, which focuses on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. Lotus has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals to integrate these objectives into its operations.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Guided by the same principle of the Lotus brand and in collaboration with Lotus UK, Lotus Technology's new Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter formalizes the activities that Lotus Technology has been carrying out. As Lotus Technology transforms rapidly to become a global pioneer of electric performance vehicles, Lotus Technology recognizes its responsibility to do so in ways that lead the industry in minimizing its impact on the environment, benefiting society and the planet as a whole. Focus on electric vehicles. The Eletre and Emeya, Lotus Technology's new generation of vehicles, mark the company's transition to a great line-up of electric vehicles. In 2024, Lotus Technology also unveiled its first concept car, Theory 1, centered on advanced technology, material minimization, and sustainable development. In contrast to mainstream industry models that utilize hundreds of surface materials, Theory 1 sets a “Challenge of $1 0 ^ { \circ }$ goal, employing only 10 core surface materials characterized by durability, lightweight properties, and renewability. By reducing material variety in the vehicle, the aim is to promote resource circularity, decrease reliance on virgin resources, and further mitigate environmental impact. Carbon-neutral sustainable development. Lotus Technology's commitment to “Driving Change” includes significant reduction in carbon emissions throughout the business, substantial elimination of waste, driving efficient and sustainable use of resources in both operations and supply chains, and protecting and preserving natural environments. The company targets to achieve carbon neutrality across the entire value chain by 2038. Lotus Technology has completed carbon footprint assessments at the organizational level for four consecutive years (2021-2024).

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus has launched a new Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter in collaboration with Lotus UK, formalizing its commitment to sustainability as it transitions into a global leader in electric performance vehicles. This initiative underscores Lotus's dedication to minimizing environmental impact and fostering positive societal contributions, particularly through its new electric models, Eletre and Emeya. The introduction of the Theory 1 concept car in 2024 further exemplifies this commitment, featuring a design that utilizes only ten core materials to enhance durability and sustainability while promoting resource circularity.

Aiming for carbon neutrality across its value chain by 2038, Lotus has implemented measures to reduce carbon emissions and waste, and has optimized resource use in its operations. The Lotus Global Smart Factory has achieved significant energy generation through photovoltaic systems and has been recognized as a "Leading Zero-Carbon Factory." Additionally, its Raw Material Natural Capital Assessment Project has gained accolades from the World Economic Forum.

Lotus is also dedicated to inspiring future generations through educational outreach in STEM fields and aligns its strategies with global frameworks like the UN Global Compact to ensure ethical business practices. The company publishes an annual ESG Report detailing its sustainability efforts under the Vision80 strategy, which focuses on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. In 2023, Lotus joined the UN Global Compact and set targets aligned with the UN Sustainable Development Goals. Its sustainability efforts have been recognized with several awards, including the Highly Commended honor at the Reuters Sustainability Awards and recognition as a Decarbonization Leader by the European Union Chamber of Commerce in China.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Manufacturing sustainability is of high importance to Lotus Technology, and minimizing environmental impacts is one of the most important targets of the manufacturing plant from the very beginning. Lotus Technology has worked with Geely Holding to carry out a series of energy-saving and emission reduction measures at Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant. The photovoltaic power generation system at Lotus Global Smart Factory generated more than 23,000 MWh in 2024. Lotus Global Smart Factory was honored as the “Leading Zero-Carbon Factory.” Moreover, Lotus Technology's Raw Material Natural Capital Assessment Project was recognized as a leading industry practice in the World Economic Forum's Nature Positive Transition Report series. Inspiring the next generation. To help engage the next generation of Lotus colleagues, Lotus Technology leverages the brand’s unique global appeal and stimulates the ambitions of the next generation, especially in the creative science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics subjects. The company helps carry out educational outreach programs and works with communities outside the core business to provide support and stability within those environments. Lotus Technology also adopts and aligns its strategy to external frameworks including the UN Global Compact, including commitments to transparent, responsible, and ethical business management. Lotus Technology's strategy focuses on six key fields: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Carbon-neutral sustainable development. Lotus Technology plans to achieve its goal of becoming a carbon-neutral company through sustainability in the design of products. Manufacturing sustainability is of high importance to Lotus Technology. Minimizing environmental impacts is one of the most important targets of the manufacturing plant from the very beginning. Lotus Technology has worked with Geely Holding to carry out a series of energy-saving and emission reduction measures at Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant, including adopting the design of a dry box spray room, the establishment of photovoltaic power generation, waste gas incineration, rainwater collection, water reuse, waste heat utilization, and other green facilities. The photovoltaic power generation system at Lotus Global Smart Factory generated more than 9,800 MWh in 2023. Lotus Technology also targets to achieve carbon neutrality across the entire value chain by 2038. Scope 1 and 2 refer to emissions that are owned or controlled by Lotus Technology, whereas Scope 3 emissions are those that occur from sources not owned or controlled by Lotus Technology but as a consequence of its activities.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus has launched its new Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in collaboration with Lotus UK, as part of its commitment to becoming a global leader in electric performance vehicles. This initiative coincides with the introduction of the Eletre, marking a significant expansion of Lotus's electric vehicle lineup. The company has set an ambitious goal of achieving carbon neutrality by 2038, emphasizing sustainable product design and manufacturing practices.

At Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant, Lotus has implemented key measures to enhance sustainability, including the adoption of energy-saving technologies and a photovoltaic power generation system that generated over 9,800 MWh in 2023. Additionally, a water reuse system has been established to recycle rainwater for various operational uses. The company is dedicated to reducing carbon emissions, minimizing waste, and promoting resource efficiency throughout its operations and supply chains.

Lotus is also committed to educational outreach programs aimed at inspiring the next generation in STEM fields. The company aligns its strategies with established frameworks, such as the UN Global Compact, reinforcing its dedication to ethical business practices.

On October 25, 2023, Lotus published its first annual ESG Report, which outlines its strategic initiatives and achievements for 2022 under the Vision80 strategy. This strategy focuses on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. In May 2023, Lotus became a member of the UN Global Compact and set specific targets that align with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Lotus's sustainability efforts have garnered recognition, including the Global Zero Carbon City Pioneer Awards in June 2024 and a nomination as a finalist in the business and operations transformation categories at the Reuters Sustainability Awards 2024. Through these initiatives, Lotus is not only positioning itself as a leader in the electric vehicle market but also demonstrating a strong commitment to environmental stewardship and social responsibility.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The driving change commitment includes significant reduction in carbon emissions throughout the business, substantial elimination of waste, driving efficient and sustainable use of resources in both operations and supply chains, and protecting and preserving natural environments. Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant adopted a water reuse system that replenishes the water volume of Lotus Lake by recycling roof rainwater. The lake water will be treated and used for greening, flushing, and landscaping. ● Inspiring the next generation. To help engage the next generation of Lotus colleagues, Lotus Technology leverages its unique global appeal and stimulates the ambitions of the next generation, especially in the creative science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics subjects. Lotus Technology helps carry out educational outreach programs and works with communities outside the core business to provide support and stability within those environments. Lotus Technology also adopts and aligns its strategy to external frameworks including the UN Global Compact, including commitments to transparent, responsible, and ethical business management. Lotus Technology released its first annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, which documented its ESG strategy and highlighted its 2022 ESG achievements as part of Lotus’s advancement into an intelligent and sustainable luxury mobility provider under the brand’s Vision80 strategy.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: Lotus UK has introduced a new Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in partnership with Lotus UK, which reflects the brand's commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. The organization aims to lead in the electric performance vehicle market while minimizing its ecological footprint and positively impacting society. All new mainstream vehicles from Lotus will be fully electric, with the Eletre marking a significant step in this transition.

To achieve carbon neutrality by 2038, Lotus is implementing sustainable design and manufacturing practices, including energy-saving initiatives at its manufacturing plant in collaboration with Geely Holding. These initiatives involve advanced technologies such as a dry box spray room, photovoltaic power generation, and a water reuse system that recycles rainwater for landscaping. The photovoltaic system is expected to generate over 16 million kWh in 2023, with a goal of achieving 100% green power by 2025.

Lotus is also dedicated to inspiring future generations through educational outreach in STEAM fields and aligning its strategies with external frameworks like the UN Global Compact. The company's inaugural annual ESG Report, published on October 25, 2023, details its ESG strategy, which focuses on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance. Lotus has set targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals to integrate these objectives into its operations.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has worked with Geely Holding to carry out a series of energy-saving and emission reduction measures at Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant, including adopting the design of a dry box spray room, the establishment of photovoltaic power generation, waste gas incineration, rainwater collection, water reuse, waste heat utilization, and other green facilities. The photovoltaic power generation system at Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant has a capacity of over 16 million kWh. Lotus Technology also targets to achieve carbon neutrality (Scope 1, 2, and 3) by 2038. Scope 1 and 2 refer to emissions that are owned or controlled by Lotus Technology, whereas Scope 3 emissions are those that occur from sources not owned or controlled by Lotus Technology but as a consequence of its activities. The driving change commitment includes significant reduction in carbon emissions throughout the business, substantial elimination of waste, driving efficient and sustainable use of resources in both operations and supply chains, and protecting and preserving natural environments. Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant adopted a water reuse system that replenishes the water volume of Lotus Lake by recycling roof rainwater. The lake water will be treated and used for greening, flushing, and landscaping. ● Inspiring the next generation.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: The Lotus Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) Charter, developed in collaboration with Lotus UK, underscores the company's commitment to reducing its environmental impact while striving to become a global leader in electric performance vehicles. Key elements of the Charter include:

1. **Transition to All Electric Vehicles**: Lotus has committed to producing fully electric vehicles for its future mainstream lineup, with the Eletre serving as the inaugural model in this transition.

2. **Carbon-Neutral Sustainable Development Goals**: The company aims to achieve carbon neutrality across all scopes (Scope 1, 2, and 3) by 2038. This objective is supported by sustainable product design and manufacturing practices. Notably, partnerships with Geely Holding have facilitated the implementation of energy-saving initiatives at their manufacturing plant, including a photovoltaic power generation system with a capacity exceeding 16 million kWh, waste gas incineration, and advanced water reuse systems that help replenish Lotus Lake.

3. **Educational Outreach and Community Engagement**: Lotus is dedicated to inspiring the next generation through educational initiatives in science, technology, engineering, art, and mathematics (STEAM). The company aligns its strategies with ethical business management frameworks, such as the UN Global Compact.

4. **Annual ESG Reporting**: The inaugural annual ESG Report was published on October 25, 2023, which outlines the company's ESG strategy and achievements for 2022. This report is part of the Vision80 strategy, focusing on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance.

5. **Commitment to Global Goals**: In May 2023, Lotus joined the United Nations Global Compact and established targets that align with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) across its focus areas. This integration of actionable frameworks into its operations demonstrates Lotus's commitment to meeting global sustainability objectives.

In summary, the Lotus ESG Charter reflects a comprehensive approach to sustainability, emphasizing electric vehicle production, carbon neutrality, community engagement, transparent reporting, and alignment with global sustainability goals.

The driving change commitment includes significant reduction in carbon emissions throughout the business, substantial elimination of waste, driving efficient and sustainable use of resources in both operations and supply chains, and protecting and preserving natural environments. Geely Holding’s manufacturing plant adopted a water reuse system that replenishes the water volume of Lotus Lake by recycling roof rainwater. metadata.title_summary:
title: Our Environmental, Social and Governance Charter 
summary: The newly developed Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Charter, created in partnership with Lotus UK, reflects the brand's commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. This initiative underscores Lotus's ambition to lead in the electric performance vehicle sector while actively minimizing its ecological footprint. The company has pledged to transition to an all-electric product lineup, with the Eletre marking a significant step in this direction. 

Lotus aims for carbon neutrality through sustainable design and manufacturing, implementing energy-saving measures and emission reduction initiatives in collaboration with Geely Holding. Key strategies include the installation of a dry box spray room, photovoltaic systems expected to generate over 16 million kWh by 2023, and a comprehensive water reuse system that recycles rainwater. The goal is to achieve 100% green power by 2025 and carbon neutrality by 2038 across all emissions scopes.

In addition to environmental efforts, Lotus is dedicated to community engagement, particularly in inspiring youth in STEAM fields through educational outreach. The company aligns its practices with the UN Global Compact, committing to ethical business conduct. The release of its inaugural annual ESG Report on October 25, 2023, highlights its strategy and achievements in transitioning to a sustainable luxury mobility provider under the Vision80 framework, focusing on six key areas: Nature Positive, Climate Neutrality, Sustainable Supply Chain, Inclusion and Equality, Community Commitment, and Transparent Governance, while setting targets aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Honored as Highly Commended at the Reuters Sustainability Awards 2024, Lotus Technology is leading the EV industry within the Reuters Vision 2045 Campaign. The company is the winner of the 2024 EUCCC Sustainable Business Award and the Green Apple Award for outstanding environmental practices. Lotus Technology's sustainable supplier management case was featured in the Shanghai Climate Week 2024 ClimateTech in Focus Report (released at COP29). If future Lotus cars look like this, then I’m very excited for what’s to come. This one is for the fans—proof that even in its electric era, Lotus Technology can rekindle past passions. It isn’t just all smoke and mirrors. Although it’s obviously not a production car, when you spend time with the people behind it and the actual vehicle, it really does start to make sense. And it doesn’t feel like a concept. [...] the Lotus Technology approach has always been technological, particularly when racing, and the Theory heritage well. If Lotus Technology can deliver even half of the Theory 1 concept, Lotus Technology could finally achieve what is expected in an electric sports car from the brand." - Forbes

metadata.title_summary:
title: Drive Change with ESG Achievements 
summary: In 2024, the organization has garnered significant accolades for its dedication to sustainability, being recognized as Highly Commended at the Reuters Sustainability Awards and emerging as a leader in the electric vehicle (EV) sector through the Reuters Vision 2045 Campaign. It also received the 2024 EUCCC Sustainable Business Award and the Green Apple Award for its outstanding environmental practices. The organization highlighted its sustainable supplier management initiatives at the Shanghai Climate Week, which will be featured in the upcoming ClimateTech in Focus Report at COP29. Meanwhile, excitement is building around the future of Lotus cars, particularly following the unveiling of a new concept that resonates with the brand's heritage and rekindles enthusiasm among fans. Although not a production model, the concept has generated genuine excitement, with Top Gear noting its potential to represent a promising direction for Lotus in the electric era. The brand’s commitment to technology and its racing legacy could pave the way for a successful electric sports car if it can bring the Theory 1 concept to fruition.

title: SIGNATURES 
summary: Lotus Technology Inc. is a forward-looking company dedicated to developing innovative solutions in the automotive and mobility sectors, with a strong focus on electric vehicles (EVs), smart mobility, and advanced technologies. Committed to sustainability and cutting-edge design, the company aims to enhance the driving experience through high-performance vehicles and integrated digital solutions. As part of the esteemed Lotus brand, known for its engineering excellence, Lotus Technology is well-positioned to influence the automotive industry's transition towards electrification and smart technologies. The report has been officially signed in compliance with the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, with Alexious Kuen Long Lee serving as the Director and Chief Financial Officer.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Commission File No.: 001-40196 LOTUS TECHNOLOGY group-lotus.com

metadata.title_summary:
title: 
summary: LOTUS TECH is a forward-thinking company that specializes in innovative technology solutions, including software development, IT consulting, and digital transformation. By leveraging advanced technologies such as artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and data analytics, LOTUS TECH aims to improve business efficiency and productivity. Their customer-centric approach and commitment to high-quality services enable them to create tailored solutions for clients across various industries, solidifying their position in the tech sector.

In contrast, Group Lotus is a renowned British automotive manufacturer established in 1952 by Colin Chapman, celebrated for its high-performance sports cars and engineering prowess. With a legacy rooted in motorsport, Lotus is known for producing lightweight and agile vehicles, exemplified by iconic models like the Elise, Exige, and Evora. Recently, the company has expanded its offerings to include electric vehicles while continuing to prioritize performance and engineering excellence, ensuring its relevance in the evolving automotive landscape. Together, both companies represent significant advancements in their respective fields, merging tradition with innovation.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: What is the gross margin outlook and reasons? Lotus Technology will achieve positive EIBTDA and cash flow by 2026 through tactical adjustments and a series of measures implemented through the Win26 program.

metadata.title_summary:
title: 11. What is the gross margin outlook and reasons? How will the company improve profit margins in the future?
summary: The company is strategically positioned to achieve positive EBITDA and cash flow by 2026 through its Win26 program, which incorporates a series of targeted initiatives aimed at enhancing gross margins and overall profitability. Central to this strategy is the maintenance of a luxury brand positioning and a unified pricing strategy designed to protect brand value and elevate brand desirability. This approach also focuses on increasing the value of used cars, thereby enhancing customer satisfaction and loyalty.

To cater to diverse global markets, the company plans to adjust its product offerings by introducing high-performance special editions and limited editions. These initiatives are expected to resonate with various consumer segments, driving sales and improving margins. Additionally, the company is committed to optimizing its operations and organizational structure, which will facilitate the implementation of cost-saving measures without compromising the premium customer experience that is synonymous with its brand.

Overall, the Win26 program represents a comprehensive approach to improving profit margins, leveraging brand strength, product innovation, and operational efficiency to secure a sustainable financial future. The company's focus on these key areas is expected to yield significant improvements in gross margin outlook as it moves toward its 2026 financial goals.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus achieved significant operational efficiency in 2024 by reducing operating expenses for four consecutive quarters. This focus on streamlining operations contributed to their robust performance throughout the year. The company also made notable progress in ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) achievements. Lotus was highly commended at the Reuters Sustainability Awards 2024, leading the electric vehicle industry within the Reuters Vision 2045 Campaign. Additionally, Lotus won the 2024 EUCCC Sustainable Business Award and the Green Apple Award for its excellent environmental practices. Further underscoring its commitment to sustainability, Lotus presented a sustainable supplier management case during the Shanghai Climate Week 2024. This was part of the Climate Tech in Focus Report, slated for release at COP29.
